presets.label: Shinnecock Course Fit
presets.description: Approach-first weighting for Shinnecock Hills. Heavy on SG: APP and driving accuracy, with elevated around-green and putting to reflect firm, difficult greens.

presets.label: Approach Heavy
presets.description: Maximum weight on approach play. GIR only 53% at Shinnecock vs 66% tour avg — iron play is the single biggest separator.

presets.label: Accuracy & Grinder
presets.description: Prioritize fairway-finding and bogey avoidance. 5-inch fescue rough severely punishes missed fairways at Shinnecock.

presets.label: Short Game & Putting
presets.description: Crowned, firm greens make scrambling and putting critical. Use when setup is playing very firm and scoring is trending over par.

previewThemes.label: Approach Play
previewThemes.description: GIR rate at Shinnecock is only 53% vs 66% tour average — approach play is the #1 separator.

previewThemes.label: Driving Accuracy
previewThemes.description: 5-inch fescue rough makes missed fairways extremely costly. Accuracy beats distance this week.

previewThemes.label: Around the Green
previewThemes.description: Firm, crowned greens produce difficult scrambling situations all week.
